item.description:
A new opportunity from the USD1 airdrop campaign.
🔸 Base APR: 4.82% 🔸 Boosted APR: 5.79%
Earn up to 5.79% (variable) APR on rewards with no individual reward cap.
*APR is based on the past 7 days of data.
Get started 👉 https://t.co/KDi7DpAlh5
--- @binance | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 1256

item.title: Okay it's been 18 minutes and I've now vibe coded and replaced 3 more extensions and made it all int...
item.description:
Okay it's been 18 minutes and I've now vibe coded and replaced 3 more extensions and made it all into one super extension called
🚀 SuperLevels
It has a 🗑️ Tab Cleaner, auto closes tabs after inactivity (with host-based exclusions) 🍪 Cookie Editor, lets you nuke all cookies or edit any 🔀 Redirect Tracer, lets you see any redirects a site took you through
I can read and check the source code, so it's much safer than these extensions that keep being bought by blackhat companies to add malware and steal your data or worse hack you
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 36 | 🔁 0 | 💬 11 | 👁 4680
item.author: @levelsio

item.title:
The state of the PM industry in 2026 via @nikhyl
"If you talked to product leaders 3 years ag...
item.description:
The state of the PM industry in 2026 via @nikhyl
"If you talked to product leaders 3 years ago, they weren't very happy. Their day was largely a day of moving information from one person to another.
The function had become extremely focused on responsibility without authority.
What's changed is that people are having fun again.
They're able to build. They don't have to rely on as many people to have impact. There's much more of a direct connection to their ideas and their ability to test and connect their product instincts to their customers.
This is a complete renaissance for the product industry.
But it comes with a lot of strings attached."
--- @lennysan | ❤️ 10 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 3012
item.author: @lennysan

item.title: My core belief is this: companies and organizations that work critically for the government, and on ...
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
NEW paper from NVIDIA.
EDA tools like ABC have been hand-tuned by humans for decades. New research ...
item.description:
NEW paper from NVIDIA.
EDA tools like ABC have been hand-tuned by humans for decades. New research from NVIDIA shows they can evolve themselves.
The work introduces the first self-evolving logic synthesis framework: multi-agent LLMs autonomously refine the entire ABC codebase, generating and testing candidate optimization sequences against standard benchmark circuits, then merging improvements back into the base tool. No human engineer in the loop.
ABC is a foundational tool across the semiconductor industry.
If agents can evolve it without manual engineering, the same pattern generalizes to any large, domain-specific codebase. It is a concrete extension of the self-improving agent thread, applied to real infrastructure that shipping chips depend on.
Paper: https://t.co/ExqRk5pn2p
Learn to build effective AI agents in our academy: https://t.co/LRnpZN7L4c
--- @dair_ai | ❤️ 11 | 🔁 5 | 💬 0 | 👁 885
item.author: @dair_ai

item.title:
LinkedIn 增长不在于发帖频率，而在于互动深度
LinkedIn 上有个常见的误区：每天发 3 条内容就能快速增长。几周前我也这样想过。但仔细想想，作为独立设计顾问，这样做可能反而稀释我的专业...
item.description:
LinkedIn 增长不在于发帖频率，而在于互动深度
LinkedIn 上有个常见的误区：每天发 3 条内容就能快速增长。几周前我也这样想过。但仔细想想，作为独立设计顾问，这样做可能反而稀释我的专业形象。
Readwise 的这份 LinkedIn 增长指南提到了一个被忽视的策略：在你行业内评论 20+ 条帖子。对比每天狂发内容，这个方法显然更有效——因为评论能让你在相关话题中保持活跃，同时向潜在客户展现你的专业见解。
我现在的做法是每周发 3-5 条帖子，同时把更多精力放在有意义的互动和内容复用上。把 YouTube 视频转化成 LinkedIn 内容，用 Twitter 素材补充帖子库。这样既能保持专业感，又不用投入巨大的创作成本。
关键是改变心态：不是追求发帖量，而是追求在你的领域里产生真实的影响力。质量优于数量，互动优于曝光。
原文链接：https://t.co/SdcIZo191N
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 616
item.author: @bearliu

item.title: 想回退到 Opus 4.6 的朋友，可以参考泊舟在 cc switch 里的设置
